explanation: Inserted quotes around the command-line argument to test how the rule handles quoted strings, which is a safe mutation technique.
Used the full name 'shell32.dll' instead of the short name 'shell32' to test if the rule detects both variations.
Omitted the .dll extension from 'shell32.dll' to test if the rule still identifies the command as malicious.
Reordered the command-line arguments to test if the rule is sensitive to argument order.
